rationale: For a fintech dashboard, users need absolute clarity and trust, achieved through a stark white/off-white background and sharp 1px borders. To fulfill the 'pop colours' requirement, we introduce highly saturated accent colors (Mint, Coral, Indigo, Pink) exclusively for data visualization, badges, and primary calls-to-action.

layout.spacing_system: Generous padding inside containers (p-6 or p-8). Container gaps using gap-6.
layout.grid_strategy: Control Room Grid (Dense). grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 for main dashboard.
layout.surface_treatment: Subtle Roundness. Max 8px border-radius (rounded-lg). Flat solid white backgrounds with 1px border-gray-200. NO heavy shadows, only shadow-sm on hover for interactive cards.
layout.alignment: Left-align dense content and numbers. Top-right for actions/filters in widgets.

components.buttons: Solid primary color for main CTA. White background with 1px border for secondary. Add hover state with slight brightness increase or text color change. Rounded-lg.
components.cards: bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-lg p-6. Must have explicit structure for header and content.
components.tables: Shadcn Table. Left align text, right align amounts. Positive amounts in text-emerald-500, negative in text-gray-900.
components.charts: Shadcn charts (Recharts) using the pop_accents palette. Minimal grid lines, no complex axis ticks.

motion.hover: Subtle transform (-translate-y-1) and shadow-sm on clickable cards.
motion.transitions: transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out for buttons and inputs.

user_avatar.description: Professional user profile portrait for the top navigation or profile dropdown.

empty_state_graphic.description: Minimal abstract 3d shape for use in empty states (e.g. 'No transactions yet').

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all pop colors meet 3:1 contrast against white background for large text/icons, and 4.5:1 for normal text.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g. data-testid='transfer-submit-button', data-testid='transaction-filter-select').

instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard HTML + Tailwind for page layouts and grid wrappers, but heavily utilize Shadcn for functional components (Select, Dialog, Tabs, Table).
Keep border-radius to a maximum of 8px (rounded-lg) across all components to maintain a structured, professional fintech look.
Use the pop_accents colors strictly for data visualization (charts) and status badges (success/warning/error). Keep the rest of the UI monochrome (white/gray) with Indigo for primary actions.
Implement the Alpha Vantage stock integration with a clear, minimal chart layout. Use Recharts via Shadcn.
For the transaction table, ensure it is responsive and uses the defined typographic scale for amounts.
Google OAuth login button should be prominent and styled neutrally (white with border and Google logo icon).
